name: de Blob 2
post_apply_message: de Blob 2 — 3 intro videos renamed to .gfm-orig. Same odd .bik.ogv extension as de Blob 1. Game runs at desktop resolution, but pillarboxed 16:9 in gameplay per PCGW — no widescreen fix documented, so this recipe only covers intros.
notes: Intro skip only. Filenames from PCGW: logoMovie, sizzle (marketing reel), THQNORDIC logo. Sister recipe to de-blob.
